pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property and compiler settings from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from 2.5.6 to 3.2.0-RC2, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Replace the deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI to support Spring Boot 3.
Update the Maven Enforcer plugin rules to require Java 21 instead of Java 17.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data MongoDB dependency for database support.
Add Mongock dependencies for MongoDB schema migration management.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation for bean validation support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Actuator for production-ready features.
Add Maven Model dependency for programmatic POM manipulation.
Add Joox dependency for jQuery-like XML/HTML processing.
Add Dom4j dependency for XML processing.
Add Night-Config Toml dependency for configuration file parsing.
Add SnakeYAML dependency for YAML processing.
Add Apache Commons IO dependency for file operations.
Add Byte Buddy dependency for runtime code generation in tests.
Add Cucumber dependencies for BDD testing.
Add Testcontainers MongoDB dependency for integration testing.
Add Awaitility dependency for asynchronous testing.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to manage Node.js and npm builds within Maven.
Add Maven Checkstyle Plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties.
Add Sonar Maven Plugin for static code analysis.
Add Maven Javadoc Plugin for generating documentation.
Add Maven Source Plugin for attaching source jars.
Add Maven GPG Plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Add Nexus Staging Maven Plugin for deploying to OSSRH.
Add Checksum Maven Plugin to verify frontend build integrity.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin to skip npm builds if checksums match.
Add Properties Maven Plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Add GraalVM Native Maven Plugin for native image support.
Upgrade JGit library to a version compatible with newer Java/Spring.
Upgrade ArchUnit library to the latest version.
Upgrade JaCoCo library to a version supporting Java 21.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to a stable version.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to a newer version.
Add -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names in reflection.
Add Spring Milestones repository to resolve Spring Boot 3.2.0-RC2 dependencies.
Update Surefire/Failsafe excludes to handle Cucumber tests correctly.
Configure resource filtering for application properties.
Update groupId, artifactId, and version to reflect the new project identity.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Remove the specific indent_size override for Java files to rely on the global default.
Enforce CRLF line endings for Windows batch and PowerShell scripts.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Ensure TOML files are treated as text with LF line endings in the repository.
Ensure patch files are treated as text with LF line endings to support git patch operations correctly.

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Refine workflow triggers to include workflow_dispatch and restrict push/PR events to the main branch.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add concurrency group to cancel in-progress runs for the same branch to save resources.
Decompose the single pipeline job into distinct jobs for Windows tests, Linux tests, Cypress, and generation.
Upgrade GitHub Actions dependencies to newer major versions (checkout v4, cache v3, upload-artifact v3).
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
uses: actions/checkout@v4
uses: actions/cache@v3
uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Replace manual Node.js and npm setup steps with a reusable composite action and use npm ci for deterministic installs.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
- name: 'Setup: environment'
  id: setup
  uses: ./.github/actions/setup
- name: 'Init: install Node.js packages'
  run: npm ci

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Integrate local SonarQube analysis and SonarCloud reporting into the Linux test job.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
- name: 'Start local Sonar'
  run: docker-compose -f src/main/docker/sonar.yml up -d
...
- name: 'Analysis: SonarCloud'
  run: ./mvnw initialize sonar:sonar ...

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Upload JaCoCo, LCOV, and JAR artifacts from the Linux test job for use in subsequent jobs.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
- name: 'Artifact: upload JaCoCo report'
  uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
  with:
    name: jacoco
    path: '${{ github.workspace }}/target/jacoco/jacoco.xml'

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Create a dedicated job to run Cypress end-to-end tests against the built application.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
cypress:
  needs: [tests-linux]
  ...
  - name: 'Test: launch Cypress'
    run: npm run e2e:headless

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Create a matrix job to generate and verify various project types (Angular, React, etc.) with different Java versions.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
generation:
  strategy:
    matrix:
      app:
        - fullapp
        - angularapp
        ...
      include:
        - java-version: 17
        - java-version: 21

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Create a dedicated job to upload coverage reports to Codecov after tests complete.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
codecov:
  needs: cypress
  ...
  - name: 'Codecov: sending JaCoCo analysis...'
    uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a final job to enforce that all required status checks (tests, codecov, generation) have passed or were skipped appropriately.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
status-checks:
  needs: [tests-linux, codecov, generation]
  if: always()
  ...
  - name: Validation Status checks
    run: | ...

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Add a job to automatically merge Dependabot pull requests for non-major version updates.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.human_impl:
dependabot-auto-merge:
  ...
  - name: Enable auto-merge for Dependabot PRs
    run: gh pr merge --auto --merge "$PR_URL"

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude Gradle wrapper JAR from version control to ensure consistent build tooling.
Exclude Maven wrapper JAR from version control to ensure consistent build tooling.
Ignore CI process ID files generated during testing.
Ignore roadmap PNG images except for the specific spring boot project image.
Ignore Tikui design system cache directory.
Ignore Fontello icon font session file.
Correct VS Code ignore pattern to allow settings, tasks, and launch files while ignoring other config.
Ignore local history files generated by IDEs.
Ignore Angular CLI cache and distribution directories.
Ignore SvelteKit generated files and cache.
Ignore personal Spring Boot application profiles to prevent committing local settings.
Remove specific personal integration test from ignore list as it is no longer needed or renamed.
Remove old template ignore rule that was replaced by specific wrapper ignores.

.lintstagedrc.js.general_idea: Add ESLint to lint-staged for JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue files in webapp and test directories.
Add Stylelint to lint-staged for CSS and SCSS files in the style directory.
Add Pug linting to lint-staged for Pug template files.
Refactor Prettier glob patterns in lint-staged to exclude files handled by other linters and include new file types like XML.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.5 to ensure compatibility with newer plugin features and Java versions.
Add the Apache License 2.0 header to the Maven wrapper properties file for compliance.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl: # Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF)...

.prettierignore.general_idea: Configure Prettier to ignore Java source files within the Gradle generator directories to prevent formatting conflicts or errors.

.prettierrc.general_idea: Add XML and Java plugins to Prettier configuration to enable formatting for these file types.
Replace the deprecated jsxBracketSameLine option with the new bracketSameLine option.
Remove the specific Java file override since the prettier-plugin-java is now added globally.
Add XML whitespace sensitivity configuration for the new XML plugin.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0'

mvnw.general_idea: Remove support for the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable, relying solely on JAVA_HOME and wrapper logic.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed M2_HOME resolution logic and references in Cygwin/Mingw path conversions

mvnw.general_idea: Update the default download URL for the Maven Wrapper JAR to the new Apache Maven Wrapper group ID and version 3.2.0.
Improve robustness of Java command detection by unsetting shell functions to avoid conflicts.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed JAVACMD assignment to use '\\unset -f command; \\command -v java'

mvnw.general_idea: Add quiet flags to wget and curl commands during wrapper download to reduce console noise unless verbose mode is enabled.
mvnw.human_impl: Added QUIET variable logic for wget (--quiet) and curl (--silent)

mvnw.general_idea: Ensure partial or failed downloads of the wrapper JAR are removed to prevent corruption issues.
mvnw.human_impl: Added '[ $? -eq 0 ] || rm -f "$wrapperJarPath"' after wget and curl commands

mvnw.general_idea: Correct the MavenWrapperDownloader fallback logic to compile the source file instead of the class file.
Support MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS environment variable for easier debugging of the Maven process.
mvnw.human_impl: Added $MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the exec command arguments

mvnw.general_idea: Remove the -Dmaven.home system property from the wrapper execution, as it is no longer required or recommended in newer Maven versions.
